name: Mexicali Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 20 oz Pineapple Chunks (canned in its own juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 3 cups of uncooked pasta.
2. Cut each tomatillo into 8 wedges.
3. Seed and finely chop the jalapeno.
4. Cook the pasta according to package directions and drain.
5. Rinse the cooked pasta with cold water and drain again.
6. Mix the pasta, tomatillos, chile, and pineapple in a large bowl.
7. Combine the reserved juice and remaining ingredients (cilantro, vegetable oil, lime peel, and salt) in a separate bowl.
8. Pour the dressing mixture over the pasta and toss well.
9. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
